name: council
description: Get an independent second opinion before acting on a plan, decision, code review, or audit. Sends the artifact to codex (an external model, read-only) plus a separate independent Claude critique, reconciles both against the actual code, and reports what's worth acting on. Two modes: `council:council` runs a thorough multi-pass loop (voices re-attack council's own draft until it converges) with interactive human arbitration of judgment calls; `council:fast` does a quick single autonomous pass.
